title: Epigram From The French.
content:
Sir, I admit your general rule,
    That every poet is a fool:
    But you yourself may serve to show it,
    That every fool is not a poet.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alexander Pope delivers a powerful performance in "Epigram From The French."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
